name: codex_plane_deployment_summary
primary_question: What bounded shared-root Codex Plane deployment posture is represented by the committed 8Dionysus owner-example chain without letting stats overrule deploy-local trust or rollout evidence?
derivation_rule: derive one committed reference snapshot from the 8Dionysus trust-state, regeneration-report, and rollout-receipt examples without treating those fixtures as current deploy-local state or a live fallback
authority_ceiling: Weaker than deploy-local workspace-root trust state, regeneration reports, rollout receipts, live doctor or verify outcomes, and source-owner validation.
